source_pr.title: *: add support for dynamic privileges
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

This adds dynamic privileges support (a feature from MySQL 8.0). The initial list of dynamic privileges is a static list, but it is possible to extend in future so that plugins can add their own privileges.

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/23224

What's Changed:

How it Works:

### Related changes

- Docs: https://github.com/pingcap/docs/pull/5077

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Initial support for Dynamic Privileges (a MySQL 8.0 feature) has been added.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("SELECT * FROM mysql.global_grants WHERE `Host` = '%' AND `User` = 'dyn' ORDER BY user,host,priv,with_grant_option").Check(testkit.Rows("dyn % BACKUP_ADMIN N")) (executor/grant_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("SELECT * FROM mysql.global_grants WHERE `Host` = '%' AND `User` = 'dyn' ORDER BY user,host,priv,with_grant_option").Check(testkit.Rows("dyn % BACKUP_ADMIN N")) (executor/grant_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds Dynamic Privileges support and corresponding tests. The referenced query already has an explicit ORDER BY, and the patch does not contain a targeted determinism/stabilization change for a flaky-test issue.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
